---
title:  
    "Mutation Trajectory Cohort Analysis"
date: 
    "August 6th, 2025"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cluster)
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(rstatix)
library(ggpubr)
library(pca)
library(readr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)

```



```{r read-in variant data}


if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/readin_data.R"))

```

```{r load visualization settings}

# Visual settings
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/1st-man/plot_custom.R"))


```

```{r}


psg_values <- seq(10, 500, by=10)

mean_distances_df <- data.frame(line=character(),
                                cluster_id=integer(),
                                mean_intra_cluster_distance=double())

min_cluster_size <- 3
cuttree_threshold <- 0.5
clustering_method <- "single"

plot_list <- list()

for (line in exp_line_factor) {
  message("Processing line: ", line)
  
  # Filter mutations with allele_freq > 0.99 for mut_id selection
  mut_id <- unique(variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == line & variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.99,"mut_info"])
  
  # Initialize allele frequency matrix with zeros
  matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = length(mut_id), ncol = length(psg_values),
                  dimnames = list(mut_id, as.character(psg_values)))
  
  # Filter mutations with allele_freq > 0.01 for trajectory building
  filtered <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$exp_line == line & variants_expiii$allele_freq > 0.001,]
  
  # Fill matrix with allele frequencies
  for (mut in mut_id) {
    for (psg in psg_values) {
      val <- filtered[filtered$mut_info == mut & filtered$passage == as.character(psg), "allele_freq"]
      if (length(val) > 0) {
        matrix[mut, as.character(psg)] <- val[1]
      }
    }
  }
  
  message("Matrix shape for ", line, ": ", dim(matrix)[1], " rows x ", dim(matrix)[2], " cols")
  

  # Hierarchical clustering
  dist_matrix <- dist(matrix, method = "euclidean")
  message("Average distance matrix: ", mean(dist_matrix))
  
  hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = clustering_method)
  
  # Cut tree to form clusters with distance threshold 0.5
  clusters <- cutree(hc, h = cuttree_threshold)
  
  results <- data.frame(mutation_id = rownames(matrix),
                        cluster_id = clusters)
  
  message("Initial clusters: ", length(unique(clusters)), ", total mutations: ", nrow(results))
  
  # Filter clusters with >=5 mutations
  cluster_counts <- table(results$cluster_id)
  valid_clusters <- cluster_counts[cluster_counts >= min_cluster_size]
  
  results_filtered <- results[results$cluster_id %in% names(valid_clusters),]
  cluster_map <- order(unique(results_filtered$cluster_id))
  names(cluster_map) <- unique(results_filtered$cluster_id)
  
  results_filtered$cluster_id <- as.numeric(cluster_map[as.character(results_filtered$cluster_id)])
  # Calculate mean intra-cluster distances
  for (cluster_id in sort(unique(results_filtered$cluster_id))) {
    cluster_members <- results_filtered[results_filtered$cluster_id == cluster_id,"mutation_id"]
    cluster_matrix <- matrix[cluster_members, , drop=FALSE]

    cluster_distances <- dist(cluster_matrix, method = "euclidean")
    mean_distance <- mean(cluster_distances)
    
    mean_distances_df <- rbind(mean_distances_df, data.frame(
      line = line,
      cluster_id = cluster_id,
      mean_intra_cluster_distance = mean_distance
    ))
  }

  mean_average <- mean(mean_distances_df$mean_intra_cluster_distance[mean_distances_df$line == line], na.rm = TRUE)
  message("Mean intra-cluster distance for ", line, ": ", mean_average)
  



  
  message("Clusters after filtering: ", length(valid_clusters),
          " with ", nrow(results_filtered), " mutations")
  
  ## Relabel clusters sequentially
  # cluster_map <- setNames(seq_along(sort(valid_clusters)), sort(valid_clusters))
  # results_filtered[, cluster_id := cluster_map[as.character(cluster_id)]]

  # -------------------------------
  # PCA for visualization using prcomp
  # -------------------------------



  pca_res <- prcomp(matrix, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

  # Create a data frame with first two PCs
  viz_df_all <- data.frame(
    PC1 = pca_res$x[,1],
    PC2 = pca_res$x[,2],
    Cluster = as.factor(results$cluster_id),
    Mutation = results$mutation_id
  )

  # Mark clusters with <5 mutations as "grey"
  cluster_sizes <- table(results$cluster_id)
  viz_df_all$ColorGroup <- ifelse(cluster_sizes[as.character(viz_df_all$Cluster)] >= min_cluster_size,
                                as.character(viz_df_all$Cluster),
                                "non_clustered")

  viz_df_all$ColorGroup[viz_df_all$ColorGroup %in% names(cluster_map)] <- as.character(cluster_map[viz_df_all$ColorGroup[viz_df_all$ColorGroup %in% names(cluster_map)]])

  # Set factor levels for color order (clusters first, grey last)
  viz_df_all$ColorGroup <- factor(viz_df_all$ColorGroup, levels = c(as.character(cluster_map), "non_clustered"))

  # Number of non-grey clusters
  n_clusters <- length(cluster_map)

  # Extend Set1 if needed
  palette_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Set1"))(n_clusters)

  # Named color vector for ggplot
  color_map <- setNames(palette_colors, as.character(cluster_map))
  color_map <- c(color_map, non_clustered = "lightgrey")

  # Plot PCA results
  fig <- ggplot(viz_df_all, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ColorGroup, label = Mutation)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_map) +
    labs(title = paste0(line, ": Mutation Clusters"),
        color = "Cluster") +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication")

  print(ggplotly(fig))

  # Save plot to list
  plot_list[[line]] <- fig

}

# After the loop: arrange all 4 plots in a 2x2 grid
fig <- grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 2)


# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig, "mutational_clusters_pca.pdf", height = 14, width = 14)

# Save using base graphics device
pdf("/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/research/manuscripts/exp-2e-update-manuscript/figures/mutational_clusters_pca.pdf", width = 14, height = 14)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 2)
dev.off()

```


```{r}



mean_distances_df %<>% mutate(host = ifelse(str_detect(line, "MT-2"), "MT-2", "MT-4"))


# Perform pairwise t-test
pairwise_results <- pairwise.t.test(
  x = mean_distances_df$mean_intra_cluster_distance,
  g = mean_distances_df$host,
  p.adjust.method = "none"  # or "bonferroni", "holm", etc.
)

# Convert matrix to long format
pairwise_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(pairwise_results$p.value))
colnames(pairwise_df) <- c("group1", "group2", "p")

# Remove NA values (from comparisons that couldn't be computed)
pairwise_df <- na.omit(pairwise_df)

# Optional: add significance labels
pairwise_df$label <- symnum(pairwise_df$p, 
                            corr = FALSE, na = FALSE,
                            cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
                            symbols = c("***", "**", "*", ".", "ns"))

# Add y-position for annotation above boxplot
pairwise_df$y.position <- max(mean_distances_df$mean_intra_cluster_distance, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05 +
                          seq(0, 0.5, length.out = nrow(pairwise_df))  # staggered positions

pairwise_df$p <- round(pairwise_df$p, 3) 

fig <- ggplot(mean_distances_df, aes(x = host, y = mean_intra_cluster_distance, color = host)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +  # hide default outliers
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +  # add individual dots
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#ff8b08", "#00bbff"),
    guide = "none"  # Hides the legend for `fill`
  ) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(pairwise_df,
                    label = "p",
                    xmin = "group1", xmax = "group2",
                    y.position = "y.position", size = 10) +
  labs(title = "",
      x = "Host", y = "Mean Intra-Cluster Distance\n") +
  custom_plot_theme(application = "publication")

# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig, "mean_intra_cluster_distance.pdf", height = 14, width = 14)


```


``{r}

line <- "MT-2_1"
results_filtered[results_filtered$mutation_id == "974_G_C",]
dist(matrix[c("972_G_A", "973_G_A", "974_G_C"),], method = "euclidean")

dist_matrix[c("972_G_A")]
str(dist_matrix)



```
